feature_stressed: percent x-axis ticks ("20%", "40%", …) + scientific-notation y-axis with an offset label (e.g. "1e7" above the y axis).
chart_title: Synthetic #8 — percent x ticks + sci-notation y ticks

tick_test.x_label_parse: Strip trailing '%' and divide by 100 to recover data value, OR (if x_axis_unit is '%') leave the value as-is.
tick_test.y_label_parse: Tick labels are plain numbers (e.g. "2", "4", …) but the y-axis carries an offset label such as "1e6" or "1e7" near the top of the axis; the actual value at a tick is `label_value × parse(offset)`.
